description: A batch of 10 'Industrial Servo Motors' was received from 'Apex Components', but Quality Control has identified that 3 of them are seized and unusable. The full order has already been billed and paid. Log into Odoo (admin@example.com / admin, database: odoo_demo) and process a return to the vendor for exactly 3 units of the 'Industrial Servo Motor' from the original Apex Components order. Create and post a Vendor Credit Note for the value of these 3 units to ensure the refund is recorded.
